Name: [Corruption] Hero's Cape
Desc:
Gain <color=#2BAD00>30 points</color>.
Agents deal <color=#2BAD00>50%</color> more DMG, but also take <color=#CF4029>50%</color> more DMG.
Desc2: A cape made in the style of a hero from another game. It might look super impressive during a fight, but it's a whole other story if your enemy gets a hold of it.
